description: Broadcast a signed Deploy transaction. Requires the signature obtained by signing the bytes from /SmartContract/Pack, plus the same byteCodeObjects/sourceCode and transactionInnerId.

request.sourceCode:
import com.credits.scapi.v0.SmartContract;

public class BasicCounter extends SmartContract { ... }

response_error_low_fee.messageError: Transaction's max fee is not enough to issue transaction. Counted fee will be 0.096191.

notes: transactionId='0.1' (poolSeq=0) means rejected pre-broadcast — NO fee consumed. Always reuse the EXACT same transactionInnerId returned by /SmartContract/Pack and the EXACT same byteCodeObjects/sourceCode (the gateway re-derives the contract address from these). Aliases: 'PublicKey'/'publicKey', 'TransactionSignature'/'signature', 'TransactionInnerId'/'innerId'. The contract address is deterministic: derive_contract_address(deployer, inner_id, byteCodeObjects) — see /SmartContract/Pack response.
